mermaid.instructions: Use these tools for collaborative design workflows: creating and managing Mermaid diagrams, wireframes, markdown documents, and UI rendering. All diagram/document operations require project path and session name parameters.

bsync-desktop.instructions: Control + screenshot the bsync-viewer Electron app (build123d CAD viewer). Tools: desktop_screenshot (capture the renderer), desktop_click, desktop_eval, desktop_list_targets. Connects to the live app via ~/.bsync-desktop/electron-cdp.json.

build123d-ocp-mcp.instructions: build123d / OpenCascade CAD verbs (run_script, create_primitive, extrude/cut/hole, add_part_step, add_connection/accept/bake, add_motor/sweep_motor/add_transmission, analyze_dof, check_clearance, validate_geometry, mass_properties, export STEP, etc.). Used to author + assemble CAD geometry and to run the CAD-arm de-risk spikes.
